network_summary: Dr. Mohammed K. Salih, DDS (title 'OWNER' on NPPES) operates 3 Chicago GP dental offices under the 'Salih Dental' / 'Salih Dental Group' consumer brand across ZIPs 60608, 60629, and 60630. The umbrella legal entity is SALIH DENTAL GROUP P.C. (NPI 1487160149, enumerated 2017-12-18, at 4408 W Lawrence Ave), with WALEED M SALIH (Manager) as the AO — indicating a family-run group. No DSO/MSO/management-company or PE layer found. The two 'Teeth Matter' P.C. entities are NPPES-registered professional corporations; the consumer brand is uniformly 'Salih Dental.' The 'Orthodontic Experts' affiliated_dso tag on NPI 1437326188 is a classifier false-positive (different practice at 2235 W Cermak, ~0.5 mi away).

stale_closed_false_positive_notes: NPI 1437326188 carries ownership_status=dso_affiliated and affiliated_dso='Orthodontic Experts' — this is a classifier false-positive. Orthodontic Experts Chicago operates at 2235 W Cermak Rd (ZIP 60608), ~0.5 miles from Salih Dental Center at 1726 W 18th St. No actual affiliation found. This tag should be cleared. Additionally, website field 'Dentalsunshinechicago.Com' on NPI 1437326188 belongs to a different unrelated practice (Dr. Nasrin Azim at 1609 W 18th St) — data error in NPPES, not Salih's website.
evidence_chain: AO signal: MOHAMMED SALIH appears as authorized official across 3 distinct watched-IL GP location NPIs (1437326188, 1902370489, 1710450952) spanning ZIPs 60608/60629/60630. NPPES title='OWNER', credential='D.D.S.' on the 18th St NPI establishes dentist-owner identity. Documentary corroboration: (1) SALIH DENTAL GROUP P.C. (NPI 1487160149) is a registered multi-specialty group entity at the Lawrence Ave address, enumerated 2017, confirming the network has a formal umbrella legal structure; (2) Consumer-facing directories (Yelp, Healthgrades, WebMD, dentistoffices.com) all list these locations as 'Salih Dental' / 'Salih Dental Kedzie' / 'Salih Dental Center'; (3) Instagram @salihdentalgroup confirms a unified brand across locations. No MSO, management-company, DSO platform, or PE sponsor found in any source. Verdict: dentist_multi, pe_backed=false, ready_for_validation.

Waleed M. Salih (Manager) on the group P.C. should be cross-checked against other watched-IL NPIs to see if he is an AO on any additional locations not yet captured. The EIN 471237454 on the 18th St location should be verified against other watched-IL practices for any EIN-cluster signal. Clear the false-positive affiliated_dso='Orthodontic Experts' tag on NPI 1437326188 in a future classifier pass.
